dependencyDashboardHeader:
## How to use this dashboard Full playbook: [RENOVATE_STRATEGY.md](../blob/main/.github/RENOVATE_STRATEGY.md) **Quick section reference** - **Pending Approval**: tick a checkbox to open the PR. Only tick items worth trying. - **Awaiting Schedule** / **Rate-Limited**: automatic, no action needed. - **Pending Status Checks**: Renovate branch exists, CI running; PR opens when CI finishes. - **PR Closed (Blocked)**: previously closed. Only tick to retry. - **Detected Dependencies**: reference only.
Automerge policy | Dependency type | Auto/Manual | Release age | Commit type | Triggers release? | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | devDependencies (patch/minor/major) | Auto | 14 days | `chore(dev-deps)` | No | | TypeScript (major) | Manual | 14 days | `chore(tooling)` | No | | Production deps patch/minor (`packages/core`, `packages/react`) | Auto | 14 days | `fix(deps)` | **Yes, patch** | | Production deps major (`packages/core`, `packages/react`) | Manual | 14 days | `fix(deps)` | **Yes, patch**
(override to `feat!` at squash if breaking) | | Peer deps | Manual | 14 days | `chore(peer-deps)` | No | | App deps (`apps/**`) | Auto | 14 days | `chore(apps)` | No | | High-severity security | Manual | 0 days | varies | varies | | Sanity-maintained (`@sanity/*`, `sanity`, `groq`, `groq-js`) | inherits | **3 days** | inherits | inherits |
Common actions **Retry a closed PR**: find it under "PR Closed (Blocked)" and tick the box. **Approve a major dep update**: tick its checkbox under "Pending Approval". This only opens the PR; you still review and squash-merge manually. If the upgrade is a breaking change for our consumers, change the commit type from `fix(deps)` to `feat(deps)!` at squash time so release-please produces a major/minor bump. **A PR won't automerge**: check CI status, that the PR is approved, and that it's not labeled `needs-review`, `major-update`, or `breaking-change`. **A lockfile looks broken**: run `pnpm install` locally, commit, and push to the Renovate branch. Renovate won't overwrite manual commits. **Rate-limited queue is huge**: drain it by merging open Renovate PRs, or temporarily raise `prConcurrentLimit` in `.github/renovate.json`. **Bumping the repo's pnpm version**: also update `constraints.pnpm` in `.github/renovate.json` to match.
Weekly checklist - Check this dashboard for pending approvals. - Review any failed automerge PRs. - Merge the release-please PR if ready. - Note any major updates that need planning.

packageRules.description: Automerge devDependencies (major) after longer stability period
TypeScript major versions - require approval due to breaking changes
Production dependencies (patch/minor) - automerge and trigger patch release
Production dependencies (major) - require manual approval. Defaults to fix(deps) for a patch release; override to feat! or BREAKING CHANGE at squash time if the upgrade affects the SDK's public API
Use bump strategy for all production dependencies in public packages
PeerDependencies - require approval as they affect consumer compatibility
Group TypeScript tooling deps (excluding typescript itself)
Group eslint related deps for easier review
App dependencies - aggressive automerge since apps aren't published
Sanity-maintained packages - shorter release age since we have direct visibility into releases and can react quickly to issues
